caption: A person's hands are shown opening a black "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" box containing a trading card. In the initial sequence, the person lifts a white protective sleeve from the box and carefully slides out a transparent plastic card holder. The background is a neutral white wall, and the surface is a dark table. Overlaid on the bottom of the scene is a promotional banner featuring the text "PYS CASEBREAKS" and a smaller image of a man wearing a black t-shirt and a baseball cap sitting at a desk. As the sequence progresses, the hands move the card holder away from the box, revealing the card encased inside. The "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" branding remains visible on the front of the black box throughout the process, and the "PYS CASEBREAKS" logo persists across the bottom of the screen.
